creator: js@jeannot.org
text:
In addition to the previous patch, a fixed pkg-plist : some files (which are links) would not get removed by pkg_delete because of a changing MD5 checksum, as discussed in the freebsd-ports mailling list.

js
  
diff -ruN scilab.bak/pkg-plist scilab/pkg-plist
--- scilab.bak/pkg-plist        Sun Aug 12 16:59:08 2001
+++ scilab/pkg-plist    Mon Aug 13 21:20:10 2001
@@ -524,7 +524,6 @@
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC++/config/Makefile.Top
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC++/config/Makefile.all
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC++/config/Makefile.incl
-scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC++/config/config
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC++/ccmatrix1.cc
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC++/ccmatrix.h
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/Makefile
@@ -533,7 +532,6 @@
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/config/Init
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/config/Makefile.all
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/config/Makefile.incl
-scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/config/config
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/JavaSciMatrix.h
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/JavaSciMatrix.c
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/JavaSciMatrix.java
@@ -546,7 +544,6 @@
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC/config/Makefile.incl
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC/config/callsci.sh
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC/config/README
-scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC/config/config
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC/README
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/Makefile
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/.scicos_pal
@@ -557,7 +554,6 @@
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciFortran/config/Makefile.all
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciFortran/config/Makefile.incl
 scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciFortran/config/callsci.sh
-scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciFortran/config/config
 scilab-2.6/examples/Makefile
 scilab-2.6/examples/man-examples/Makefile
 scilab-2.6/examples/man-examples/help.sce
@@ -7439,6 +7435,10 @@
 scilab-2.6/util/Slatdoc
 scilab-2.6/.binary
 scilab-2.6/.pvmd.conf
+@unexec rm -f scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciJava/config/config
+@unexec rm -f scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciFortran/config/config
+@unexec rm -f scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC/config/config
+@unexec rm -f scilab-2.6/examples/callsci/callsciC++/config/config
 @dirrm scilab-2.6/util
 @dirrm scilab-2.6/tests/demos
 @dirrm scilab-2.6/tests
